headline: Teledyne Subsidiaries Expand Imaging And Defense Reach With Targeted Growth Moves
summary: Teledyne Technologies (NYSE:TDY) subsidiaries announced several new products and partnerships across defense, industrial imaging, and utility markets. Teledyne GMI partnered with Southern Cross to expand gas detection solutions and service coverage across the Southeast U.S. Teledyne e2v launched the Perciva 5D camera aimed at cost-effective 3D vision for industrial and retail uses. Teledyne FLIR Defense signed an MoU with STORM Adapt Group to support unmanned aerial system integration for...
